subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1912-10-17 in San Francisco
subcodes.first_line: This question may be answered in two ways, philosophically as well as spiritually. ...in philosophy the spirit is energy
subcodes.first_line_orig: دو جواب دارد یکی جواب فلسفی و یکی ملکوتی جواب فلسفی آسان است چه که
subcodes.subjects: @existence and nonexistence; preexistence, @existence; immortality of the human soul
